title: [Millah's Fen, Cold Stream]
description: A ruined cobbled road rises from the waters of the cold stream and ascends a nearby stream bank.  The tall reeds give way to smaller reeds and grasses that overwhelm the stream and prevent any further passage north.  A gnarled sycamore bends over the stream with pale white limbs draped in hanging moss.

wayto.11687: ;e if checkspell(112); move 'south'; else; empty_hands; move 'swim south'; fill_hands; end; waitrt?
